concerns.text: FR-001(c) mandates excluding features with |r| > 0.85 correlation to the target. The plan explicitly forbids this, and tasks (T014) follow the plan. No task exists to implement the spec's FR-001(c) requirement, leaving a functional requirement unimplemented.

FR-005 requires bootstrapping the *dataset* 100 times to verify feature-set stability. Tasks T033-T035 implement 'SHAP-only resampling' (two-stage bootstrap) as per the plan. No task exists to implement the spec's requirement for full dataset resampling and re-training.

FR-007 mandates an iterative VIF-based feature removal loop (removing features until VIF ≤ 5.0). Tasks T031 explicitly restrict VIF usage to 'diagnostic clustering only' with 'NO features removed'. No task exists to implement the spec's FR-007 feature removal logic.

SC-003 defines success as Jaccard similarity of the 'top 10 SHAP features'. Tasks T034-T035 implement the metric for 'top feature clusters' as per the plan. No task exists to measure the spec's specific success criterion (top 10 individual features).

Task T009 restricts configuration to 'hardcoded seeds and paths only (NO .env or YAML)'. The plan lists 'pyyaml' as a primary dependency and implies config files. This creates a conflict where the task blocks a capability suggested by the plan's tooling list.
